subject: Gutter Cleaning - 379 Prune St, Lavington NSW 2641

data.issue: Good Afternoon,I’m writing to discuss establishing regular gutter cleaning as part of the property’s annual preventative maintenance schedule as we are coming into Autumn.With the recent severe weather events we have experienced across the Albury–Wodonga region, we have seen a number of properties affected by roof leaks, water ingress, internal leaks, and associated damage. In many cases, these issues have been linked to blocked or overflowing gutters that were unable to manage the volume of rainfall during storms.When gutters are not cleaned regularly, debris such as leaves, dirt, and pine needles can accumulate and cause blockages. This can lead to water overflow, which may result in roof damage, fascia and soffit deterioration, foundation issues, leaks, and even mould growth. In colder months, clogged gutters can also contribute to ice dams, which can further damage roofing materials and interior ceilings.Scheduling professional gutter cleaning once per year (or twice, if needed based on surrounding trees) is a relatively low-cost preventative measure compared to the potential expense of repairing water-related damage. In most cases, gutter cleaning typically costs between $200.00 – $400.00, depending on the size of the property, roof access, and the amount of debris present.It is also important to note that some landlord insurance policies may not cover water damage if the cause is determined to be preventable maintenance issues, such as gutters being full or not maintained. Ensuring gutters are cleaned regularly can help reduce the risk of damage and potential insurance complications. Regular maintenance also helps extend the life of the roofing system and drainage infrastructure.We highly recommend that gutter cleaning be added to the property’s routine annual maintenance to ensure the home remains in good condition and to help prevent further maintenance issues in the future.Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you would like us to arrange a quotation for gutter cleaning at your property. We value working collaboratively with our landlords to proactively maintain their properties and protect the long-term condition of their investment Thank you for your time and consideration.Kind Regards, Diaz Willis Property Managers Assistant Elite Property Management Agency02 6056 9688www.elitepmagency.com.au
